title: What happened to Custom Automation builder?
excerpt:
Hi all, 
Is anyone able to access the custom automation builder recently?  Trying to build a custom automation and I’m getting this blank screen.

posts.author: z_kolbeck (Zeina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
Is anyone able to access the custom automation builder recently? Trying to build a custom automation and I’m getting this blank screen.

image1865×1034 16 KB

posts.author: lauralev (Laura Levy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @z_kolbeck ! I am so sorry you were having trouble a while back with our Custom Automation builder. I wanted to check-in and see if you were still experiencing this issue on your end? If you’re still having trouble, you can reach out to us at support@monday.com to look into this further. Appreciate your communication here and hope all is resolved!
Cheers,
Laura

posts.author: z_kolbeck (Zeina)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @lauralev - thanks for checking in. yep it’s been working since then, i think it was just a glitch at that time
Cheers,
Zeina

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
